subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Beloved One Who, at the time of His ascendancy upon the throne, dwelt in the garden named Ridván [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که حین استوای بر عرش در بستانی که به رضوان نامیده شده
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @war and peace, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
